basic_details.job_title: SVPNPA Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Language Instructor, Stenographer Grade and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel National Police Academy (SVPNPA)
basic_details.post_name: Language Instructor, Stenographer Grade and More
basic_details.short_information: The Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel National Police Academy (SVPNPA) Outsourcing Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 27 April 2026 on the official website. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the SVPNPA Outsourcing Posts Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 64 years for all posts.

qualification.details: System Administrator: Master’s degree in Computer Application/Science/IT or BE/BTech in Computer Science/IT + 5 years experience in System Administration. Language Instructor: Bachelor Degree in Telugu/Assamese/Urdu/Kannada/Bengali/Marathi/Manipuri/Nagamese/Oriya/Tamil/Gujarati/Punjabi/Nepali/Malayalam/English + 1 year teaching experience. Assistant (Ministerial): Retired officials holding analogous post in Level-6 or retired UDC with 10 years in Level-4. Network Administrator: 12th with Science/Math + Diploma in Computer Applications/Electronics & Communication/IT or Bachelor in Electronics/Computer Science/IT/Computer Applications + 2 years networking experience. Stenographer Grade-II: 12th pass + Skill test: Dictation 80 wpm (10 min), Transcription 50 min (English)/65 min (Hindi) on computer.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SVPNPA Outsourcing Posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the SVPNPA Outsourcing Posts is 25th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the SVPNPA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies announced for various Outsourcing Posts at Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel National Police Academy (SVPNPA).

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the SVPNPA Outsourcing Posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the Outsourcing Posts at SVPNPA is 64 years as on 01st April 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for SVPNPA Outsourcing Posts?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) to apply for the SVPNPA Outsourcing Posts.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the SVPNPA Outsourcing Posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the SVPNPA Outsourcing Posts will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 45,186/- to Rs. 1,27,633/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for SVPNPA Outsourcing Posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the SVPNPA Outsourcing Posts is offline. Candidates need to send their applications to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the contract period for these posts?
faq.answer: The contract period for these Outsourcing Posts at SVPNPA is up to 30th September 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Which qualifications are required for the System Administrator post?
faq.answer: For the System Administrator post, candidates need a Master’s degree in Computer Application/Science/IT or BE/BTech in Computer Science/IT with at least 5 years of experience in System Administration.

faq.question: Q9. What are the eligibility criteria for the Language Instructor post?
faq.answer: The Language Instructor post requires a Bachelor Degree in Telugu, Assamese, Urdu, Kannada, Bengali, Marathi, Manipuri, Nagamese, Oriya, Tamil, Gujarati, Punjabi, Nepali, Malayalam, or English, along with 1 year of teaching experience.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for SVPNPA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification for SVPNPA Recruitment 2026 can be downloaded from the "Important Links" section of this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" link.
